tg.exp_basis: amorphous atactic PS Tg 373 K (100 C) +/-5%.
tg.tg_note: well-resolved single-sweep hyperbola fit; corroborates PS3's slow-rate 376.5 (delta 0.6 K). Exact sweep rate not recorded in summary, but the value matches PS3's r40 -- treated as a slow/well-resolved fit, not a fast-rate coincidence. PS Tg STRADDLES exp across replicates (376-437 K): the well-resolved slow/single fits (PS1 375.9, PS3 376.5) land at exp; the runs lacking a clean slow rate (PS2 2 fast rates, PS4 noisy) inflate +11%. PASS reflects a well-resolved slow fit, not a fast-rate coincidence.

density.exp_basis: amorphous atactic PS 1.05 g/cm3 +/-5% (polymer_rules PSTR), at 300 K (measured target_temp_K=300, actual ~300.0).
density.density_note: MARGINAL FAIL: graded -1.9% past the 0.9975 floor (~-6.8% vs the 1.05 midpoint) = documented aromatic-PCFF underdensity, PEEK-style, NOT a cliff. Cells ARE equilibrated at 300 K (drift<0.22%, sem pass, homogeneous) -> NOT under-equilibration. Under-dense cell is COHERENT with the low K (under-packed -> soft), unlike PMMA's incoherent low-density/high-K.

bulk_modulus.exp_basis: K_T [3.3,4.0] GPa, glassy aPS 25 C (Mark2007 Tait/Zoller1978); supersedes the stale K_S [3.5,5.5].
bulk_modulus.method_note: CORRECTED: was 3.8545 method='fluctuation' PASS, but that was the REMOVED born_nvt value (invalid PCFF+PPPM virial); real fluctuation=2.7103. Fluctuation-only = weakest rung of the glassy hierarchy (no Murnaghan/deform for PS1). FAIL-low -17.9% vs K_T floor 3.3. ALL PS K land 2.4-3.0 GPa (-10 to -26%), a systematic underestimate COHERENT with the ~-6% underdensity (under-packed cells are softer). K is NOT a headline PASS for PS.
bulk_modulus.correction: CORRECTED: was 3.8545 method='fluctuation' PASS, but that was the REMOVED born_nvt value (invalid PCFF+PPPM virial); real fluctuation=2.7103. Fluctuation-only = weakest rung of the glassy hierarchy (no Murnaghan/deform for PS1)

provenance.review_note: PS replicate cross-check 2026-06-28: Tg is the headline (PS1 375.9 + PS3 376.5 PASS at well-resolved slow/single fits; PS2/PS4 inflate +11% lacking a clean slow rate). Density MARGINAL FAIL x4 (aromatic-PCFF underdensity at 300 K) and K FAIL x4 (2.4-3.0 GPa) are COHERENT (under-packed -> soft). PS1 K corrected: the reported 3.85 'fluctuation' PASS was the REMOVED Born value -> real fluctuation 2.71 FAIL. PS2 relabeled from bandless 'rate_extrapolated' to single_rate_fallback with K_T/Tg bands applied.
